description_long: This object is a vintage television set with a boxy, rectangular wooden exterior and a prominent black screen on the front. The top surface features a metallic base with two V-shaped antenna rods extending upward, characteristic of mid-20th-century TV designs. The front panel includes a large, glossy black screen area, a wooden side panel, and a section with two round black control knobs. The sides and back are finished in a wood grain pattern, giving it a classic, retro appearance. The television stands on four small, rounded feet, slightly elevating it from the ground. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible seams and a sturdy, solid build.
description: A vintage, box-shaped television with a wood grain exterior, black screen, and V-shaped metal antennas on top.
description_view_0: The side view shows the wood grain panel and the metallic antenna base with one antenna visible.
description_view_1: The front view displays the large black screen, wooden panel, two control knobs, and both V-shaped antennas.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the wood grain finish and the metallic antenna base, with no screen or controls visible.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the full wood grain back panel and both antennas, with no screen or controls visible.
attribute_bezel_design: medium-thick black bezel, glossy finish, rectangular, no visible branding
attribute_control_button_layout: two round knobs on the lower right front panel, arranged vertically
